## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and progress between Unstructured and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calibration article pending Tarun's review; once approved, content production can scale to \~5 posts/week (50k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Unstructured website relaunch planned for end of July to mid-August, coinciding with major product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Content strategy adjusting due to temporary product issues; focus on repurposing old content until fall relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Branko (GrowthX): Director of portfolio, supports Jürgen & team, escalation point, strategy advisor](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Jürgen (GrowthX): Managing editor, leads project execution](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Sara (Unstructured): New to calls, working with Stefanie](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Stefanie (Unstructured): Primary point of contact for Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Content Progress and Next Steps

  - [Calibration article awaiting Tarun's technical review](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Airtable updated for clearer topic grouping and approval process](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Goal: 5 posts/week, 50,000 words/month once calibration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Stefanie to ensure Tarun reviews articles and approves next batch of topics by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Website and Publishing Strategy

  - [Unstructured website relaunch: end of July to mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Current strategy: Link to completed articles, publish in batches (e.g., weekly on Fridays)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Post-launch: Regular publishing on new website](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Content Focus and SEO

  - [Need to align content with key search terms: "enterprise data for Gen.AI", "transforming data", "how to parse a PDF"](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX to embed relevant YouTube content (e.g., recent "how to parse a PDF" video) in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Unstructured temporarily reducing original content production due to product issues](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Branko to investigate additional keywords (potentially including "ETL") using SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Communication and Collaboration

  - [Unstructured to share content calendar in the future, especially post-product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow Unstructured's social media for content ideas and embedding opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tarun to review calibration article and approve next batch of topics (by end of day)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Stefanie to ensure Tarun completes reviews promptly](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin scaling content production once calibration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Branko to provide keyword insights from SEMrush analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Teams to maintain communication on content calendar and social media updates](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
